visual_findings: The generated drawing now keeps the same-name reference structural style gates green and includes right projected-view dimensions.

The drawing is still not reference-intent-led: dimensions remain AutoDimension-like baseline groups rather than the reference drawing's concise end, hole-position, and inspection-oriented blue dimension placement.
The generated front/top/right dimension groups are visually heavier and located differently from the reference, so a drafter would still need manual cleanup before manufacturing release.
Titlebar and notes are present, but API/style pass is supporting evidence only; the application UI screenshot remains the final visual gate.
cases.required_next_action: Replace generic AutoDimension-generated baseline groups with explicit SolidWorks dimension creation for long_thin reference intents: overall envelope, end offsets, hole center positions, projected-view size, and inspection reference dimensions.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
